name: Rhubarb/Strawberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Sliced fresh rhubarb (1/4 inch Pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first seven ingredients and let stand for 15 minutes to soften tapioca.
2. Place the bottom pastry in a deep dish 9-inch pie pan.
3. Add filling.
4. Top with a lattice crust.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 375°F; bake an additional 30 minutes or until filling is bubbly and rhubarb is tender.
